queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Analyze the empirical relationship between the absence of a checking account and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Investigate the statistical impact of a negative checking account balance on the likelihood of reduced credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Examine empirical evidence regarding the association between minimal savings balances and decreased default probability.
